name: local-lms
description: Local LMS monorepo with Next.js, Express, Prisma, and shared TypeScript types.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @lms/shared && npm run build -w @lms/server && npm run build -w @lms/client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @lms/shared && npm run typecheck -w @lms/server && npm run typecheck -w @lms/client
